linkEmbed.description: Decision marks the first construction permit ever issued by the NRC for a commercial non-light-water power reactor.
linkEmbed.title: NRC Issues Construction Permit for TerraPower’s Natrium Advanced Reactor

user.displayName: Office of Nuclear Energy | US Department of Energy

twitter.content:
MAKING HISTORY 🚧: @TerraPower’s Natrium advanced reactor project in Kemmerer, Wyoming, just received a construction permit from the @NRCgov.

It’s the first commercial non-light-water power reactor construction permit to be approved by the NRC.
